name: Possible Impacket`s Atexec.py Script Execution
description: This detection identifies Impacket’s atexec.py script on a target host. atexec.py remotely run on an attacker machine to execute commands on the victim via scheduled task. The command is commonly executed by a non-interactive cmd.exe with the output redirected to an eight-character TMP file.

filterSets.name: Process Spawned via Possible Impacket`s Atexec.py Script Execution

author: Lucas Silva
